DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF JAMES MEDEIROS MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSE TO CASE QUESTIONAIRE AND IMPOSING MONETARY SANCTION (DEFENDANT FRED LEWIS)IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $521.19 IS DUE BY 4:30PM ON JANUARY 30, 2018. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED; JUDGE: STEVEN STEIN; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY (HK/302/JPT).

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR COMPEL RESPONSE TO THE CASE QUESTIONNAIRE IS MOOT, THE RESPONSE HAVING BEEN SERVED PRIOR TO THE HEARING ON THIS MOTION AFTER IT WAS FILED. THE MOVING PAPERS REFLECT MULTIPLE ATTEMPTS TO OBTAIN THE REQUIRED DISCOVERY RESPONSE PRIOR TO THE FILING. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE SUM OF $60.00 ARE AWARDED AS AGAINST DEFENSE COUNSEL ONLY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. PROCEEDING'S NOT REPORTED; JUDGE: STEVEN STEIN; CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY (HK/302/JPT).

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-23-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Response To Case Questionaire And Imposing Monetary Sanction (Defendant California Affordable Housing, Llc)
Off Calendar Jan-09-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ATTY MARK COHEN OF LAW OFFICES OF MARK COHEN P.C. TEL NO. 510.792.4008 APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING - Plaintiff's motion for compel response to the Case Questionnaire is moot, the response having been served prior to the hearing on this motion after it was filed. The moving papers reflect multiple attempts to obtain the required discovery response prior to the filing. Monetary sanctions in the sum of $60.00 are awarded as against defense counsel only. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Proceeding's not reported; Judge: Steven Stein; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (HK/302/JPT).

MOTION For Order Compelling Response To Case Questionaire And Imposing Monetary Sanction (Defendant Fred Lewis)
Off Calendar Jan-09-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: ATTY MARK COHEN OF LAW OFFICES OF MARK COHEN TEL NO. 510.792.4008 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES.

RULING - PLAINTIFF JAMES MEDEIROS MOTION For Order Compelling Response To Case Questionaire And Imposing Monetary Sanction (Defendant Fred Lewis)IS GRANTED. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $521.19 IS DUE BY 4:30PM ON JANUARY 30, 2018. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Proceedings not reported; Judge: Steven Stein; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (HK/302/JPT).

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2017 Set For Trial On Jun-25-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2017 Continued To Dec-20-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
